pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Define the MapStruct library version property for dependency management.
Define the Lombok-MapStruct binding version property to enable integration between Lombok and MapStruct.
Define the Liquibase library version property for database migration management.
Add Lombok as a provided dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities.
Add the Keycloak Admin Client dependency to enable programmatic interaction with Keycloak.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to exclude Lombok from the repackaged jar since it is a provided scope dependency.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use Lombok, MapStruct, and their binding as annotation processors.
Set a default password for the Liquibase plugin in the default profile.

src/main/docker/postgresql.yml.general_idea: Explicitly set the PostgreSQL password in the Docker Compose environment variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Keycloak server configuration properties to the development application profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl:
keycloak:
  server-url: http://localhost:9080
  realm: jhipster
  client-id: admin-cli
  username: admin
  password: admin
